reviews.review_description: I’m really looking forward to where this adventure goes. Truly a gorgeous environment to fly in and the storyline has so much potential!

Updated review:

The newly added smooth turn option makes this much, much better, so I'm adding a star. Flying about and solving the (so far) light puzzles is smooth and compelling.

But then as I was having a great time last night, it abruptly ended! I'm not into Discord but keen to know when you plan to release this as a full game.

The movement is great, the atmosphere is great, the graphics are lovely apart from a few dodgy blurred textures, and my only gripe is the pathetic audio and haptic feedback when shooting.

Original review:

Awesome movement system! Lovely feeling of freedom to fly around, Superman-style. 

I like games where you are placed into a world, given just enough info to be able to crack on, and then something clicks and it just works. This game does that.

But what it doesn't do is let me smooth turn. Quick turn works for the uninitiated but not necessarily for those who have been VRing for years.

The sound effects are currently a bit weak, but that's not a biggie.

So yeah, recommended but please devs, smooth turn!

This game was nothing like I expected.  I was having a blast up until I turned into a golem and slammed my hand into my side table, trying to punch a black orb lol. So then I was forced to stop and ice my hand.  Kind of felt like superwoman the way the locomotion propels you in the direction you push your fists.  Definitely excited to continue my journey once my hand heals up some haha.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! So sorry you hurt your hand! We are glad you enjoyed it so much, please be sure to clear space for punching motes!

reviews.review_description: Fun game. Great graphics, I’ve had this game for a few years.    And still has no update on next chapter.   Will there be more chapters to come or no.  Let me know so I can delete game if need be,     But definitely hope theirs more to come, like I said fun game needs to continue
Looks like it might be a good game but it just doesn’t work

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you're having trouble downloading the game. We've checked to be sure, and are not finding any issues with downloading to devices on our end. Can you please check your internet connection and try the download again? If it still doesn't work, please reach out to Meta technical support.

reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely majestic. The feeling of flying is incredible and smooth. The puzzles are nice. The environment and story are Miyazaki-esque (or Ori-esque if we are to stick with video games) and very promising. Is there an estimated date of full release? This could be an absolute winner.
Awesome movement, and a great start to the puzzles. Cant wait for the release!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing, we're so glad you enjoyed the movement and puzzles! If you haven't, join our discord for updates and news at: https://discord.gg/YB8zReJx82

reviews.review_description:
This is gorgeous!  I wonder how far you can fly away? Smooth game play, great puzzles. Probably one of my favorite flying mechanics. 

A few notes 
- The golem's right arm didn't function properly, no matter how I took control of him. 
- and grabbing things as the golem is.. of poor functionality.
- the captions aren't always in a position to be read, just kind of floating off somewhere. 
- the guides voice is bland, and soft-spoken. 
- It was unclear how the meters on either hand function. 
- it would be nice if charging the star blast made it considerably bigger, as all enemies were 1 shot anyway. 
- also, I thought you could "store" the elemental charge? But you don't, you just drag it.
The rapid fire takes away from the games difficulty, although fun to shoot a barrage of stars. 
- suggestion --- 2+ different types of fire power? Like hot star/cold star that effects enemies differently if hit with the wrong one?? 
- Definitely more enemies to shoot at. 
- A noise signifying the enemy has spawned.
----
Minor improvements /ideas.. I had fun playing it! That's why I still give it 5 stars and support what this is becoming.  
Dev's will do great things with this game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the in depth feedback! We have a big update out now that makes drastic improvements to many aspects of the game, including a new physics-based interaction and movement system, a complete renewal of the Raven audio, and a new player UI and energy storage system. Player abilities and new enemies will be coming in the future islands! Come join our discord for more feedback, updates, and news at: https://discord.gg/YB8zReJx82

reviews.review_description:
Basically what everyone else has said.
One con: exiting the game appears to reset your progress to the start + or am I missing something.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing! Saving mid-level progress is not currently supported, it is on the roadmap for upcoming updates though! Keep an eye out for updates on our discord at: https://discord.gg/YB8zReJx82

reviews.review_description: This game is so different from anything else I have played! Flying through the level is a blast, I think the way you have to physically push and pull the controllers in the direction you’re moving helped me feel more oriented and in control. Flying through the intro story scene was especially exciting, I swear I got goosebumps it felt like I was a part of the story! The environments in this game are gorgeous and the colors of the level mesh really well with the colors and designs of the puzzle pieces. The puzzles are challenging and engaging, and the sound effects for them are satisfying. This game is only in Beta currently but I can't wait to see what the rest of the game is like.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing, we are so glad you enjoyed it! If you haven't, join our discord for updates and news at: https://discord.gg/YB8zReJx82

reviews.review_description: I played this demo on my Quest 1 and I enjoyed everything. I find the graphics and audio superb for a mobile VR headset. Didnt expect this to be soo good.

I was hooked the instant the flight controls were explained at the start of the game. VR was made for experiences like this. 

Visually it’s stunning to look at. The cinematic story opening pulls you in right away and sets the tone for the rest of the journey. The music is appropriately atmospheric. I loved this. 

If I had to lodge one complaint, there’s zero haptic feedback in the controllers and there’s bo “wind shear” sound, so the flying felt more like operating in zero gravity than soaring through the air. This is a minor thing though. I’m definitely looking forward to more.

Super awesome. I loved this demo, it has an amazing introduction, right from the start of the game, it reveals itself to be a visually beautiful experience. The puzzles are fun and creative. I'm looking forward to the full release, I can't wait to play more!

developer_response.body: So glad to hear it, thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun, I was disappointed when I finished it. The graphics are beautiful, the locomotion is different but easy to get used to, and the storyline is unique and fun. I did get a little bit of a headache, but I’m sure that will be worked out by full release. And that is my only complaint!

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing the beta! We are always working on improving performance, so be sure to check back for updates. For updates, and news, and feedback, come join us at: https://discord.gg/YB8zReJx82

reviews.review_description:
Pretty cute game. Flying is pretty fun too.

Would love to have a bit of momentum after releasing the flying button though.
I love the control system in this game and there are too many cool things about it.  I know it's early, but I hope you get the support needed.

reviews.review_title: Creative, Interesting, and I want more!
reviews.review_description: I played through the beta today - and I was very intrigued and entertained.  This game literally lifts the player from the mundane flatland experience so many games offer and transport one into a world of visual imaginings and organic creativity.  More than twice I felt the pleasure at realizing some mechanic or circumstance being represented in the game play environment.  Being a beta player, I only saw a shorter segment of the full game;  I hope the game devs continue what they've started - because I plan on revisiting this title once released.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing the beta, we are so glad you enjoyed it! If you haven't, come join our discord for updates and news at: https://discord.gg/YB8zReJx82

reviews.review_description: THIS GAME .is bloody good the only problem I the game don't save .please please please    make it so you can save the game.as iv played through the same part three times .  And give a through hits on the reply tuogh bits . .I love to give the game 5 stars .but carnt stay in long enough to finish the game without a save .

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We are very glad you are enjoying the game, and definitely understand the desire for saving. In fact, we are releasing a new update soon with progress saving, along with new content to discover! Keep an eye on our Discord for news about the update: https://discord.gg/W3CVAPu

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the movement and flying mechanics in this game. The way you control the speed movement of flight was unique and intuitive. This game has beautiful imagery and transports you to another realm. I thoroughly enjoyed playing this game and look forward to more. 5/5!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review, we are so glad you enjoyed playing! Join us on Discord for updates, and news, and feedback: https://discord.gg/YB8zReJx82
